name: @authms/next
description: AuthMS Next.js SDK — middleware, server session, and provider for Next.js App Router

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --clean --external next --external @authms/core --external @authms/react --external react --external react-dom
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --watch --external next --external @authms/core --external @authms/react --external react --external react-dom
